package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_growth_without_size_hint: Map insertions inside loops without a visible size hint on the initial make call.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule356PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario356Positive(records []Rule356PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
